name: MSI FORGE TKL WIRELESS MLG EDITION Mechanical Gaming Keyboard - Red Linear Switches - 1.06" Display - Sound-Dampening Foam & Gaskets - Hot-Swappable Design - RGB LEDs - 2.4GHz & Bluetooth & USB-C Wired Connectivity (FORGEMLG)
